title: [v0.52.x][git cherry-pick 5c81adc] apparmor: fix parsing beta/alpha version
body: Similar as https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1744, we need `git cherry-pick 5c81adc` via v0.52.x for CRI-O v1.26.x (see https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/blob/release-1.26/go.mod#L22)

comments.body: @rhatdan could we have corresponding branch created for PR?

I give a temp fork branch for v0.52.0 + cherry-pick, see https://github.com/alvistack/containers-common/commits/alvistack/v0.52

So it should basically working for CRI-O release-1.25 and release-1.26, see
* https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/7501
* https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/7500
